source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in <image>, a fully controlled converter bridge feeds a highly inductive load with ripple-free load current. The input supply \( V_s \) to the bridge is a sinusoidal source. Triggering angle of the bridge converter is \( \alpha = 30^\circ \). The input power factor of the bridge is _____.
